compiled_state.title: Wire PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE in ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md (CP7)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Context

Story 12bf-521f: Wire PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE through all 7 interactive checkpoints in preplanning.

This task connects the existing INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED paths in `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md` to the PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE flag. The file already has partial non-interactive handling; this task wires the flag to drive those paths consistently.

## Dependencies

Requires T1 (241e-0fdf) and T2 (66d3-522e) to be complete first.

## Files to Modify
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md

## Implementation

The file already contains INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED references at the design confirmation, review, and approval steps (approximately lines 133, 228, 313). These need to be conditionalized on PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE.

### Flag context

The PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE value is read by SKILL.md at startup. It must be passed through to the dispatch protocol as part of the preplanning execution context (document how callers pass it).

### CP7 — UI designer confirmation/review/approval steps

For each of the 3 existing INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED locations:

- If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=true (default): follow the existing interactive path (present to user, await approval)
- If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=false: use the existing INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED path that is already partially implemented in the file

Add explicit PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE conditionals at each INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED location so the branching is unambiguous.

## Acceptance Criteria

- plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md has explicit PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE flag checks at each INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED location
- The CP7 test in 241e-0fdf test file (test_cp7_ui_designer_interactivity_deferred) passes GREEN after implementation
- Interactive path is unchanged when PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=true
